§6Gauges & Switches§f

§aUnleash advanced, aesthetic Redstone control systems in your industrial complexes!§f
§9Gauges and Switches§f replaces boring levers and buttons with highly configurable, premium control interfaces. From rustic wooden pull-chains and toggle switches to modern industrial button panels, biometric touchpads, shock-resistant levers, and visual redstone power level gauges, this mod allows you to automate and monitor your facility with maximum style and precision.

§6System Architecture & Configuration§f:
§b• Configuration Wrench§f: §9Right-click§f or double-left-click switches with a §9Redstone Torch§f to open their configuration options or cycle settings (timeout is §c700ms§f).
§b• Remote Wireless Linking§f: §9Right-click§f switches with §9Ender Pearls§f or §9Switch Link Pearls§f to link a remote receiver to a sender, up to a maximum distance of §c48 blocks§f.
§b• Custom Pulse Timers§f: §9Shift-right-click§f or click with §9Redstone Dust§f to set customized redstone output durations.

§6Sensor & Meter Performance§f:
§b• Gauges§f: Sample weak power inputs every §c8 ticks (0.4s)§f to visually map redstone currents on analog or digital scales.
§b• Linear Sensors (Lasers)§f: Scan for block/entity interruptions every §c4 ticks (0.2s)§f using laser beam ray-tracing.
§b• Volumetric Sensors (Infrared)§f: Scan area volumes for movement every §c10 ticks (0.5s)§f.

§6How to Master Your Control Board§f:
1. §bCraft a Gauge or Switch§f: Select from a wide variety of styles (industrial metal, rustic wood, glass-encased) to match your build.
2. §bAdjust with a Torch§f: Use a §9Redstone Torch§f as your wrench to customize input sensitivity, toggle/pulse modes, sound emissions, or color tints.
3. §bLink Remotely§f: Set up a wireless receiver to control heavy doors, reactor containment grids, or automated machinery from across the room without messy redstone dust trails.
